bcm_devtoolV2_commit.onDown: if bcm_devtoolV2 and bcm_devtoolV2.propsHotkeyCommit then bcm_devtoolV2.propsHotkeyCommit() end
bcm_devtoolV2_commit.title: BCM DevTool V2 - Commit Props Placement/Removal
bcm_devtoolV2_commit.desc: While in the BCM DevTool V2 Props tab (place or remove mode), commit the current action at the cursor.

bcm_devtoolV2_cancel.onDown: if bcm_devtoolV2 and bcm_devtoolV2.propsCancelMode then bcm_devtoolV2.propsCancelMode() end
bcm_devtoolV2_cancel.title: BCM DevTool V2 - Cancel Props Action
bcm_devtoolV2_cancel.desc: While in the BCM DevTool V2 Props tab, cancel the current place/remove action and return to idle.
